title: NCRTC Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
post_name: Assistant Manager/ Telecom and Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications
short_info: National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC) Assistant Manager/ Telecom and Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications Notification 2026 has been released on 18-05-2026 on the official website of National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom and Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Assistant Manager/ Telecom: 62 Years Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications: 40 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/ 03 years Diploma in Engineering Or MBA, M.A, P.G.D.M
qualification.details: Assistant Manager/ Telecom: Degree/ 03 years Diploma in Engineering in ECE/ Electrical/ Electronics with a minimum of 20 years of experience. Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications: Full Time-M.B.A./ P.G.D.M. in Marketing or equivalent and Full Time -M.A./ P.G. in Mass Communication or equivalent

salary_details.details: Assistant Manager/ Telecom: 75,200/- p.m Assistant Manager/ Marketing & Communications: 50000-160000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCRTC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom recruitment is 18 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree or a 03-year Diploma in Engineering in ECE/ Electrical/ Electronics, along with a minimum of 20 years of experience to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 40 to 62 years. The maximum age allowed is 62 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from PM 50000 to PM 75200 /-.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection stages for the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom post is on a Contract basis.
